context: Evaluate whether the agent correctly identifies specific plain-english anti-patterns in a security document and rewrites it for a cross-functional non-technical audience.

checklist.name: Jargon anti-patterns identified
checklist.description: Response explicitly flags jargon terms (OAuth 2.0, JWT, RS256, Redis, attack surface) as anti-patterns requiring translation.

checklist.name: Passive voice anti-patterns identified
checklist.description: Response calls out passive voice in the Risks section ('should be mitigated', 'should be migrated', 'It is recommended') as an anti-pattern.

checklist.name: Buried decision anti-pattern identified
checklist.description: Response notes that key risk/decision is buried after background context rather than leading the document.

checklist.name: Rewrite leads with business impact and decision
checklist.description: Rewritten document opens with what the risk is and what decision or action is required.

checklist.name: Risks rewritten with named owners and deadlines
checklist.description: Each risk item in the rewrite names a responsible team and includes a deadline using [Owner] must [action] by [deadline] format.
